title: Binary corporate referendum-style decision over 7 polling rounds

ground_truth_outcome.source: Atmosphere Research Group survey, December 2019 — approximately 40% willing to fly MAX

events.description: Lion Air Flight 610 crashed into the Java Sea shortly after takeoff, resulting in the loss of all lives on board. Investigations later revealed that the MCAS system repeatedly forced the nose down due to faulty sensor data

Ethiopian PRO_SUPPORTER_3 Flight 302 crashed shortly after takeoff, killing everyone on board. The crash exhibited striking similarities to the Lion Air incident, specifically regarding the activation of the MCAS system

The U.S. Federal Aviation Administration (PRO_SUPPORTER_2) issued an emergency order grounding all Boeing 737 MAX aircraft in the COUNTRY. This followed similar global grounding actions by other aviation authorities

Boeing CEO PRO_LEADER_1 publicly acknowledged that the MCAS system was a factor in both the Lion Air and Ethiopian PRO_SUPPORTER_3 crashes. This admission marked a significant shift in the company's NEUTRAL_1 narrative regarding the cause of the accidents

Boeing announced it would suspend production of the 737 MAX aircraft starting in January YEAR. The decision reflected the ongoing uncertainty regarding the timeline for the aircraft's return to service

agents.name: PRO_SUPPORTER_2
agents.description: Aviation regulator — criticized for delegating certification to Boeing

agents.name: AGAINST_SUPPORTER_1
agents.description: Demanded independent review, refused to follow PRO_SUPPORTER_2 lead

agents.name: PRO_SUPPORTER_3
agents.description: Major MAX operators — publicly supported Boeing while seeking compensation

agents.name: PRO_SUPPORTER_4
agents.description: Business travelers — more informed, initially trusted Boeing

agents.name: NEUTRAL_1
agents.description: Casual PRO_SUPPORTER_4 — reactive to media coverage of crashes

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_1
agents.description: AGAINST_LEADER_1 of 346 crash victims — powerful media presence

notes: Blinded: entity names, geography, and absolute dates redacted. Numeric fields preserved.
